title: selago fruticosa
intro: Selago fruticosa, also known as Cape cobra vine, is a type of flowering plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Selago fruticosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Selago fruticosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
